title: Bored Explosives
description: just adds some weird explosives make sure to not break the world
body:
> # A MASSECURE OF EXPLOSIVES!!
> - Tired of normal TNT?
> - Want to destroy someone's house in seconds?
> - Want some Explosive animation?
> - This mod is just for you maniac people!
> 
> ## Explosives
> **TNT:** a small TNT that does destroys near by blocks
> 
> **Gernade:** Just a regular gernade with slightly bigger explosive
> 
> **Nuke?:** Massive explosion with loud noise
> 
> **ATOMIC?!!:** Comparing to a nuke, this one is basicly terrifying

**Notice:** Please add the nbt structures first before trying out the explosives, the nbt has animations for each explosive
